title: chrysanthemum haussknechtii
intro: Chrysanthemum haussknechtii, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is known for its yellow or white flowers and is native to the mountainous regions of Iran and neighboring countries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating fever and reducing inflammation. The medicinal properties of Chrysanthemum haussknechtii are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic content, which have been shown to provide various health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anticancer effects. Herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum haussknechtii can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
